reason: Authoritative edit-plan, zoom transform, exporter filter, publish preset, stale-plan, and quality-report contracts.
Cross-stage edit-plan/exporter/subtitle manifest behavior and postprocess ordering must stay compatible.
Backend stage changes require focused contract tests, UTF-8 persistence discipline, and no ad hoc schemas.
Chat-burst/media fallback diagnostics should stay compact and avoid raw transcript or media secrets.
KDA parsing and frame sampling helpers already exist and should be reused rather than duplicated.
Zoom close-ups span shared contracts, edit planning, exporter filters, reports, docs, and runtime envs.
